candidates.why: Major operating revenue line item; slightly lower than Revenue which includes other income, so use as fallback if main Revenue label changes or is missing in some years.
Potential historical or alternative revenue label specific to freight operations, but appears empty in recent years; use as a lower-priority fallback.
Explicit total revenue line that matches top-line amounts; best representation of total revenue/sales.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Net non-operating result, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue.
OCI components, not revenue.
Net comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using multiple labels as a priority list for revenue: primary is the explicit 'Revenue' line; 'Operating revenue' and then 'Gross Freight Income' are fallbacks in case the main label changes across years.

candidates.why: Classic COGS label, but appears to have no recent values; may relate to historical periods.
Direct costs related to providing shipping/voyage services; functionally part of cost of sales for this business model.
Direct operating costs of vessels used to generate revenue; appropriate as COGS/component of cost of sales.
Likely time-charter related direct operating costs; appropriate COGS component.
Direct costs for bareboat charters; appropriate COGS component.
Direct procurement of goods/services tied to revenue; clear COGS component.
General personnel costs, more akin to SG&A than COGS given separate operating expense structure; should be excluded from COGS.
Broad operating overhead bucket; better classified as SG&A, not COGS.
Likely operating overhead with third parties; not clearly direct production costs.
Staff/overhead costs, not direct cost of sales.
Non-recurring COVID-related item; not structural COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement COGS line.

variables.notes: COGS is mapped to the main direct operating cost buckets related to providing shipping/voyage services (voyage, vessel, TC, bareboat, and procurement expenses). These represent service delivery costs and exclude overhead items like personnel and other operating expenses.

candidates.why: Personnel overhead costs; a classic SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; fits SG&A definition (excluding D&A).
Explicit administrative expenses; core SG&A component.

variables.notes: Selected all key operating overhead components (personnel, other operating, and administration costs) and excluded totals and depreciation/impairment lines in line with SG&A rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Represents the income statement expense related to R&D via amortization of capitalized R&D; best available proxy for R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense line; indicates capitalized R&D.
Gross capitalized R&D asset; balance sheet, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment contra-asset; not a current-period expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Company appears to capitalize R&D; the current-period R&D-related expense flows through amortization of the capitalized R&D, so that amortization line is used as XRD.

candidates.why: Aggregated interest/finance expense line; appropriate fallback when more detailed interest expense lines are missing.
Primary gross interest expense line item; best first-choice for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense and useful if main interest line is missing.
Additional interest expense component; good secondary fallback.
Generic finance items line; unclear composition and appears unused; low-priority fallback at best.
Represents minority interest in discontinued operations, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; can serve as an additional fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Interest-bearing debt to credit institutions short term
candidates.why: Balance sheet debt, not an expense.
Balance sheet debt, not an expense.
Accrued interest liability, not the period expense itself.
Balance sheet debt, not an expense.
Balance sheet debt, not an expense.
Balance sheet debt, not an expense.
Equity minority interest, not interest expense.
Equity minority interest, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of income statement interest expense lines: main gross interest expenses first, then other and lease-specific components, and finally the aggregate finance expense and supplemental lease interest as lower-priority fallbacks.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity; Minority Interest is reported separately and appears zero, so this serves as equity attributable to owners.
Component of equity only; not total book equity.
Replicates Total Equity in this case (Minority Interest is zero); using this could risk double counting if MIB were nonzero in other periods.
Technical balancing line; not the main equity measure.
Balancing item, not a substantive equity total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the statement; not equity itself.
Represents total assets/financing, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit 'Total Equity' line as book equity. Minority interest is reported on separate lines (all zero here), so using Total Equity avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Minority interest related to discontinued operations; not the main balance sheet non-controlling interest, but indicates presence of minority interest concept.
Income statement allocation, not the equity balance; not ideal for balance-sheet-based MIB.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best source for MIB, even though values are currently nan (treated as zero).
Total minority interest in income statement; not a balance sheet equity amount.
Combined equity and minority interest; using this would double count with BE, so it should not be used for MIB directly.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the dedicated balance sheet 'Minority Interest' line. Although values are nan in the preview (implying zero in recent years), this is the correct structural location for non-controlling interests.
